title: How to cancel your subscription
description: Instructions for canceling your WagerProof Pro subscription on each platform.

content.text: You can cancel your WagerProof Pro subscription at any time. Your access continues until the end of your current billing period.

steps.title: Find WagerProof
steps.description: Tap WagerProof in your active subscriptions list.

steps.title: Open Google Play Store
steps.description: Go to Google Play Store > Menu > Subscriptions.

steps.title: Cancel subscription
steps.description: Tap 'Cancel subscription' and follow the prompts.

content.text: If you subscribed on the web via Stripe, go to Account settings and click 'Manage Subscription' to cancel.
After canceling, you'll retain Pro access until the end of your current billing cycle. No partial refunds are issued for the remaining period.
